title: The South Bird Hunt
description: The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.

dialogue.text: You know, pirate Mont Blanc Cricket,
